choice: Yes — an append-only observation log keyed by (holding, as-of date, source). The latest row is the current state; the full series is the substrate Net-Worth-Actuals-vs-Plan (a core deliverable) reads to plot actuals over time. Channel/source is stamped on each row for provenance and conflict resolution.
rationale: The objective makes 'track actual net worth over time' central, and a single mutable balance field can't reconstruct history — you'd lose every prior point the moment a new sync lands. 9b7cc94d already gives a Holding an as-of date for its LAST observed value; promoting that to a log is the minimal change that unblocks tracking. The spreadsheet (source) only carries one aggregate dollar balance per YEAR, so a daily/per-observation log is a deliberate fidelity delta, not a transcription.
